info.name: text-delete
info.text:
Life is a contest with winners and losers.
Life isn't always fair, because the rules don't always apply equally.
Life involves going around in circles sometimes.
Life is equal parts skill and chance.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Life sometimes involves going around in circles.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: The rules of life aren't always applied equally, so life isn't always fair.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: In life, you have to play the hand you draw.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: You can't quit life in the middle of it; everyone has to see it through both ups and downs.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: No one gets out of life without facing challenges.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: The one who starts in the best position isn't always the winner in life.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Sometimes a simple twist of fate turns a loser into a winner in life.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: You don't get to choose the challenges you face in life, you just have to figure out how to overcome them.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Life is equal parts skill and chance.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Life is a contest with winners and losers.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Sometimes the best strategy in life is to wait for your rivals to fail.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Life is a gamble, but no one wins without taking at least some chances.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: You can blame the cards you're dealt in life, but you still have to play them.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: You have to take turns in life and wait for your turn.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: In life, you don't always win the prize you desire or deserve.
